title: useMediaQuery
description: Evaluates a CSS media query and returns a boolean result, updates in real-time.
summary: Reactively matches CSS media queries in JavaScript.

You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.`}),`
`,(0,r.jsx)(t,{name:"use-media-query",code:`"use client";\r
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";\r
\r
export interface UseMediaQueryOptions {\r
  getInitialValueInEffect: boolean;\r
}\r
\r
type MediaQueryCallback = (event: { matches: boolean; media: string }) => void;\r
\r
function attachMediaListener(query: MediaQueryList, callback: MediaQueryCallback) {\r
  try {\r
    query.addEventListener("change", callback);\r
    return () => query.removeEventListener("change", callback);\r
  } catch (e) {\r
    console.log(e);\r
    query.addListener(callback);\r
    return () => query.removeListener(callback);\r
  }\r
}\r
\r
function getInitialValue(query: string, initialValue?: boolean) {\r
  if (typeof initialValue === "boolean") {\r
    return initialValue;\r
  }\r
\r
  if (typeof window !== "undefined" && "matchMedia" in window) {\r
    return window.matchMedia(query).matches;\r
  }\r
\r
  return false;\r
}\r
\r
export function useMediaQuery(\r
  query: string,\r
  initialValue?: boolean,\r
  { getInitialValueInEffect }: UseMediaQueryOptions = {\r
    getInitialValueInEffect: true\r
  }\r
) {\r
  const [matches, setMatches] = useState(getInitialValueInEffect ? initialValue : getInitialValue(query, initialValue));\r
  const queryRef = useRef<MediaQueryList>(null);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    if ("matchMedia" in window) {\r
      queryRef.current = window.matchMedia(query);\r
      setMatches(queryRef.current.matches);\r
      return attachMediaListener(queryRef.current, event => setMatches(event.matches));\r
    }\r
\r
    return undefined;\r
  }, [query]);\r
\r
  return matches;\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-media-query.ts"})]})}function d(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,r.jsx)(u,{...n})}):u(n)}function k(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return v(b);})();
